title: TISU ANHU ACHO
author: ABASID 1841
description: Teaching from THE ABASID CALIPHATE collection: TISU ANHU ACHO (We Are The People)

verses.text: 20.TISU ANHU ACHO 15/01/26

Mamukawo sei mose, mambo ndino kumbirawo mu imbe ku imba kwamaita kwekuti SANTA MARIA uko, imbai ka PFUMBAMWE, mapedza moisa nhau dzepa muganhu dzamataura apo bedzi, ini ndinozo uya seri kwenyu, Ne MAZWI e ZUVA ☀️ ranhasi, NDATENDA 🙏🏻 Ndisati ndapatsanura pano pinda nhau ye DOMBO, regai titange tichiti,
Pane nhau yekuti vanhu vakuru vanogona kutaura mwana mudiki aripo asi ogotadza kuziva zviri kutaurwa.
Mwana uyu anogona kubata dzidziso iri munhau, asi agotadza kubata nhau yacho chaiyo.
Asi vakuru vanofara kuti dzidziso yasvika, asi paanenge achitaura paye vanenge vachiseka nemufaro.
Zvino nakidza vanhu vakuru kana vana vachitaura nyaya yakadzama asi vasingazive zvavari kunyatsotaura.
Vakuru vanogona kutoseka kubuda misodzi mwana achitaura zvaakadzidza kuva mukuru.
Kufanana ndizvo zvakafanana nenhau dzese idzi pamunoti IDHO, kana kuti MAIDHONA, kana kuti GABRIEL, kana kuti SATAN, kana kuti JESU.
Zvose izvi ingano dziri kuparidzwa sengano.
Vaiti ndiri pamuganhu wedenga nenyika,
BVUNZO: Ko pamuganhu wepanze nemumba panei???
ANSWER: HATIZIVI
Okay saka chiri pamuganhu iDOOR 🚪
Zvino kureva kuti chiri pamuganhu wedenga nenyika pane iDOOR 🚪zvakare. Ndosaka ndichitangira pamunogumira.
Nhau iyi haichada vana vaduku.
Munhu wose akabva kudenga achiuya panyika, kureva kuti akatopfura nepa DOOR.
Ndopane nhau yekuti SANTA MARIA iDOOR.
Ndiri kuedza kurerutsa mashoko nekuti mashoko angu anoti pisei kuvana vadiki, kwete pamakore asi papfungwa.
Ndosaka muchiona vamwe vachitiza, vanenge vari vanhu vaifunga kuti vakura ivo vasati.
Saka ndivo vanonzi chimbono vhiyai mbudzi mozo dzoka.
Zvisinei tereresai.
Chinonzi kunyadzisa chiri mupfungwa dzeari kuteerera.
Munhu wose anoziva paakapinda napo mu group muno.
Munhu wose anoziva paakapinda napo munyika ino.
Munhu wose anoziva paakapinda napo achibva kudenga kuna Baba.
Ipapo ndopane kuyera kwemhandara.
Regai ndikupei muenzaniso.
BVUNZO: Nzvimbo iyi iripi uye panoitwei?
ANSWER: Heroes Acre iri mu Zimbabwe inovigwa magamba
Ko TSVIMBO iyo iri apo inopfuta moto usingadzime yakaisirwei apo, chitererai.
Ini ndini ndakarangana nemagamba ndikati musatye rufu hakuna rufu.
Kana munhu akafa mweya wake unodzokera kuna Baba kudenga nekuti pasi pano ndepa Amai. Asi kana denga raona zvakakodzera kuti udzoke mupasi ucharutswa semwenje kubva ku TSVIMBO yaBaba.
Saka HEROES ACRE igate rine TSVIMBO yaBaba.
Hameno vari kunzwa zvimwe.
Ini ndiri kuparidza TSVIMBO yaBaba.
Baba wedu muri kudenga.
Hameno vari kunzwa zvimwe.
Ini ndiri kutaura kubarwa patsva kweva ISRAEL.
Zvino hamungaberekwe pasina TSVIMBO yaBaba.
Iyo TSVIMBO yaBaba kutaura.
Hanzi tsvimbo iyi inonzi OBLISQUE.
Ine ETERNAL FLAME, mwenje usingadzime.
Symbolizing, kureva kuti chiri chiratidzo che SPIRIT kana MWEYA wemagamba usingazofa, kunyangwe nyama dzavo dziri muvhu.
Iyi ndiyo dzidziso yakapihwa magamba.
Nekuti hatife.
Saka imi munofunga kuti nekuti makuziva kuparidza gumi remutemo mava kuziva kudarika vakuru, kwete muchiri vana.
Saka hapana angati bvisai mukuru mberi mugadze mwana.
Pazasi ndafamba kutangira pawataura kusvika kwekupedzisira, ndisina kuchinja kana shoko rimwe.
Saka hapana angati bvisai mukuru mberi mugadze mwana, nekuti akuziva hopriji spati.
Ndauya ne shoko rekuti
Ko zvamunge mava nendebvu wani, ko sei muchiri kutaura muchiti ukagara mu road unoita mamota, madiwo kuchiti unoita motor.
Pamberi ndozodzoka futi ndichiti ayewa kana motor yacho hauite.
Ndopata va, imi muri kuti tinoita motor nekuti ndizvo zvakataurwa pamavambo.
Ndichadzoka, ne nhau ye TSVIMBO yaBaba.
Ndatenda ☀️🙏🏻 Ndadzoka zvishoma.

Zvino taona kuti pa HEROES ACRE pane OBLISQUE, ini ndikati iTSVIMBO yaBaba, ndini ndavamba kukuudzai, kuitira vachatevera. Ndosaka ndavamba nekuti imi munozivei, mukataura pamunogumira ini ndikasimudzira kubva ipapo, saka musazonditi uri kutsinha ani, nekuti ndini ndavamba semutsinhirwi kwete mutsinhi.
Baba Johani vakati vanhu vakandogara ku RHODESIA vakabva ku ARABIA ne EGYPT, saka
Kureva kuti tsika iyi yekuti musha wedu vana veZUVA haufanire kushaika OBLISQUE kana TSVIMBO yaBaba, yakavambira EGYPT kwataiva. Chitarisai apa muone kuti Tenzi Baba Johani havana kupotsa.
Ku EGYPT kune nzvimbo yainzi MUSHA we ZUVA kana kuti CITY of the SUN, ndokuti HELIOPOLIS muchiGREEK.
HELIO = ZUVA
POLIS = MUSHA
Ndopaiva ne OBLISQUE yekutanga, nanhasi iripo.
Nzvimbo iyi yaitonzi the COLLEGE of ANU.
Kureva kuti Chikoro che ANHU.
TISU ANHU ACHO.
Tarisai muone CITY OF THE SUN nekuti SUNSHINE CITY chinhu chimwe chete.
Ndokuti HARARE is known as the SUNSHINE CITY, ndokuti HELIOPOLIS KA.
Tarisai apa, TISU ANHU ACHO.
Chikoro chedu ndicho chakavamba kudzidzisa MATHEMATICS.
PYTHAGORAS akadzidza ipapo.
Ma teacher edu aisanzwi teacher ainzi MUPARIDZI kana kuti PRIEST.
Vose vamunonzwa vachinzi ndivo vakatanga kudzidzisa MEDICINE vakatenge vadzidza kunesu.
Isu tainge tazvidzidza ku NGIROZI.
Honai apa, ukavhunza GOOGLE kuti WHO IS THE FATHER OF MATHEMATICS, inoti murungu ainzi
ARCHIMEDES nemumwe ainzi PYTHAGORAS ndivo zvibaba zvakavamba MATHEMATICS.
Isu tobva tati ok, regai tichivhunza GOOGLE yacho yadaro kuti ko zvibaba zvenyu zvakanga zvadzidziswa nanani MATHEMATICS dzacho.
Unonzwa vachiti akadzidza ku EGYPT ku COLLEGE of ANU.
Tozvivhunza kuti saka anonzi FATHER sei ipo paine vakatomudzidzisawo.
Mumwe wacho ndi PYTHAGORAS, ari kunzi FATHER of MATHEMATICS futi, asi akadzidziswa ne ANHU vatema, akanga adzidza kubva ku IZWI pa MUSHA we ZUVA KA.
Saka vachena vakaba MBIRI yaBaba vakaiita mbiri yavo.
Kusvikira nemi mati vachena ndivo vakatanga kukomborerwa ne IZWI, isu tiri marema.
Iyoyo dzidziso yaiva yaMWARI nekuti aida kutanga abvisa kuzvikudza pakati penyu, ozokuti ayewa nevanji ndimi.
Asi mhere iripo ndeyekuti mumwe acharamba achiti sei machinja.

Haungati kumusikana wausiri kuda ndokuda, uye haungati kumusikana wawakuda handikude nekutya kubvunzwa kuti sei wachinja.
Saka nhau dzaunotaura newausingade dzakasiyana nedzaunotaura naye kana wava kumuda.

Nekuti munhu waunoda haumusiya achitambudzika kushaya mishonga muzvipatara.
Makafananidza kutsurwa nekunzi I LOVE.

Bvumai mururame kuna Baba hakusi kuti ndinokuda.
Baba Johani havana kuuya neshoko rekurumbidza vatema asi vakauya neshoko rekutsura vatema.
Kureva kuti mupurisa akauya ne chain, usazomufananidza nemusikana akuvigira maruva.
IMI PINDUKAI MHANI.
